scripts.check:board-contract: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/check_board_contracts.py
scripts.check:reliability-slo: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/check_reliability_slo.py
scripts.check:reliability-slo:strict: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/check_reliability_slo.py --env production --strict
scripts.check:release-signoff: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/check_release_signoff.py --strict
scripts.build:release-gate-summary: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/build_release_gate_summary.py --release-profile production --strict-required
scripts.check:plugins-compat-smoke: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/plugins_compat_smoke.py
scripts.check:skills-compat-smoke: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/skills_compat_smoke.py
scripts.build:release-drill-report: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/build_release_drill_report.py --release-profile production
scripts.test:quick: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/test_system_improvements.py --mode quick
scripts.test:full: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/test_system_improvements.py --mode full
scripts.gate:release: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/release_gate.py --report backend/data/regression_report.json --min-pass-rate 1.0 --max-failed-items 0 --allow-status pass
scripts.release:check: npm run check:session-state && npm run check:task-status-wiring && npm run test:full && npm run gate:release
scripts.release:strict: npm run test:task-status-projection && npm run collect:task-status-projection-evidence && npm run check:board-contract && npm run check:plugins-compat-smoke && npm run check:plugin-runtime-compat-smoke && npm run check:skills-compat-smoke && npm run check:reliability-slo:strict && npm run check:legacy-terms:strict && npm run check:release-signoff && npm run build:release-gate-summary
scripts.release:drill: $( [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ] && echo backend/.venv/bin/python || echo python3 ) backend/scripts/release_drill.py --release-profile production --strict-required
